retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the put is incidental and not the function's primary purpose.

judge.reason: Function performs multiple operations: flushing echo skbs (which includes a put on sk_buff users), allocating and sending an error frame, manipulating carrier state, and invoking device-specific restart via do_set_mode. The put is only one step in broader business logic. Primary purpose is device restart after bus-off, not refcount management.
